issue_body_preview:
Hi vHawk,

me again with roofs, sorry. In #18 I had the building heights, but sometimes we work only with building:levels. In this case I have a building with two floors: [way/230178929](https://www.openstreetmap.org/way/230178929/history)

I had to create weird building:part shapes to render th
test_description_zh: 在地图中导航到包含 building:min_level 属性的建筑（如 OpenStreetMap way/230178929），观察该建筑的屋顶和楼层渲染效果，特别关注仅使用 building:levels 而非具体高度值时，建筑部件（building:part）的屋顶是否正确显示在对应的最低楼层之上。
expected_result_zh: 带有 building:min_level 标签的建筑部件应正确渲染，屋顶应出现在正确的高度位置，建筑楼层与屋顶之间不应出现错位、重叠或屋顶缺失的问题。无需创建特殊的 building:part 形状即可正确显示多层建筑的屋顶。
